name: sap-journal-auditor
description: Audit SAP FI/CO journal entry exports for anomalies, duplicate postings, unusual cost center assignments, period-end outliers, and approval bypass patterns. Outputs a structured audit memo in English or German.

file.description: CSV or Excel export from SAP FI/CO (FB03, FAGLL03, KSB1, or ACDOCA extract)

period.description: Fiscal period to audit, e.g. '2025-03'. If omitted, audits all periods in the file.

threshold_duplicate_amount.description: Minimum amount (absolute value) to flag potential duplicates. Default: 1000.

audit_memo.description: Structured audit memo with flagged items, risk levels, and recommendations

flagged_entries.description: CSV of flagged journal lines with anomaly type and severity
